agent.name: Reihaneh Majidi
agent.title: Business Owner

description.headline: Contact Globe Life American Income Division, Agent Reihaneh Majidi in Omaha, Nebraska
description.body: Globe Life American Income Division is all about Opportunity Unlimited. There are no limits to how much you can earn, how far you can advance in your career, or how many people’s lives you can help protect. As an independent contractor, you are in control of your financial worth and leadership performance.

agent.quote: Believe in yourself enough to take the leap of faith and get started with our great Company.

about.intro: Helping people through difficult times has always been important to Reihaneh Majidi. Before joining Globe Life American Income Division (AIL) in 2007, Reihaneh attended the Parma School of Nursing’s two-year program in Brecksville, Ohio, earning her degree as a Licensed Practical Nurse. But when Reihaneh realized AIL offered her the ability to help people while earning a great living, she was ready to shift gears.
about.achievements: Some of my greatest accomplishments with Globe Life American Income Division are training the #1 Supervising Agent in the Company in 2012, helping others to achieve their goals, and the pride I feel as a General Agent walking across the stage at Convention.
details: What would Reihaneh change if she could restart her AIL career? “I would focus more on leadership early on.”

Because we are able to take care of policyholders’ loved ones long after their death, I believe we offer an opportunity for someone to not only generate a great income, but to feel wonderful about what they do and the community they serve.
Married with two children, Reihaneh likes to travel with her family, enjoys the outdoors, reading, and maintaining her personal fitness.
Her business is active in the community — collecting canned goods for local food drives and donating to charitable organizations to help with food, clothing, and gifts during the holiday season.
Advice for others considering an AIL career: “Believe in yourself enough to take the leap of faith and get started with our great Company.”
about.closing: Are you ready to embrace a new and empowering opportunity? Contact Globe Life American Income Division today, because your future starts NOW!
